About Me
EYS
Level Designer & 3D Modeler

Hey! I'm Eys, a passionate Level Designer, Map Builder & 3D Modeler who loves crafting roblox game environments and gameplay spaces. My style of predilection is Stud and Low Poly!

I focus on player experience first: flow, pacing and environmental storytelling. I make sure every map plays as good as it looks.

Level Design3D ModelingMap BuildingEnvironmental ArtGameplay FlowWorld Building
